items.name: Black & Pink Flower Dragon Tail
items.description:
Dragons come in all different shapes, sizes, and forms. While there's many different classifications of dragons, why not look deeper into their fantastical roots? With this glimmering and blooming tail, you can connect with the world around you, while looking like a fairy of your own! Just be certain that no one around you has a pollen allergy, as that could become a problem really quickly!

( This item is part of a colored set, you can find the other variants here!: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=Flower&Category=1&CreatorName=Draconic+Artisans&salesTypeFilter=1 )
